name: Recover
message: You begin reciting the recovery invocation.
description: You regenerate mana twice as fast and spells have a 5% reduced mana cost. Out of combat regen is not affected.

name: Empower
message: You begin reciting the empowering invocation.
description: Adds 40% plus 20% per additional non-hybrid casting class to Damage effects at the cost of 40% more mana. Adds 20% plus 10% per additional non-hybrid casting class to Healing effects at the cost of 20% more mana.

name: Inversion
message: You begin reciting the inversion invocation.
description: Shifts two-thirds of spell cast time into the global recovery time and 20% of the mana cost into half as much in endurance cost.

name: Spell Blade
message: You begin reciting the spellblade invocation.
description: Treats the first spell-gem slot as a proc that consumes both mana and endurance on activation. 40% of the spells mana cost is paid as mana and 20% as endurance. The spell must have a reuse time less than or equal to its cast time.

name: Over Channel
message: You begin reciting the overchannel invocation.
description: Cast spells have a -150 resist adjust plus another -15 for every non-hybrid caster class at a cost of 10% of the mana cost in endurance.

name: Inviolable
message: You begin reciting the inviolable invocation.
description: Cast spells are uninterruptible at the cost of 100% more mana and the same amount as endurance.

name: Divine
message: You begin reciting the divine invocation.
description: Spending mana will heal the group member with the lowest hp percentage by that amount. For every additional wisdom class, this will repeat with a heal for 33% of the mana spent.

name: Chained
message: You begin reciting the chained invocation.
description: When a spell is successfully cast then instantly cast the next cheapest spell of the same type that does not have a cooldown at a cost of 66% of the instantly cast spell.

name: Arcane Mastery
message: You begin reciting the arcane mastery invocation.
description: Spell cast and recovery times are reduced by 25% plus 10% per additional intelligence class. The mana cost of detrimental spells is reduced by 15% plus 5% per additional intelligence class.

name: Unyielding
message: You begin reciting the unyielding invocation.
description: Health regen excluding out of combat bonus regen is doubled with a 25% resistance increase to loss of control from fear, mez, and charm.
